author: Bernardo Kuri
text: Confirmed: Bug is in @coolver/home-assistant-mcp upstream package, not mcproxy. The ha_read_file tool description says 'Read and display linter errors' but the inputSchema correctly shows it reads files from /config. This is a description mismatch in the MCP server itself. Other tools (wikipedia, sequential_thinking, coinstats) have correct descriptions, so this is isolated to the home_assistant MCP server package.

author: Bernardo Kuri
text: CONFIRMED: Tested HA MCP server directly via stdio (bypassing mcproxy). The bug is in @coolver/home-assistant-mcp@latest package. Tool description says 'Read and display linter errors' but inputSchema correctly shows it reads files from /config. This is a copy-paste error in the upstream MCP server, not mcproxy.
